title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 59.640 - Rerecorded conveyances admissible in evidence
text:
59.640.  Rerecorded conveyances admissible in evidence. — The record of such rerecorded conveyances shall impart notice to the same extent and shall be admissible in evidence with like effect as the original record.
(RSMo 1939 § 3649) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3259; 1919 § 10621; 1909 § 10432
